title: aster bellidiastrum
intro: Aster bellidiastrum, also known as the Campanuloid Aster or Bell's Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as being a natural antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Aster bellidiastrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Aster bellidiastrum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
